seoTitle: Ourimbah vs Owens Gap — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ourimbah and Owens Gap. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ourimbah vs Owens Gap: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ourimbah and Owens Gap.
heading: Ourimbah vs Owens Gap — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ourimbah, New South Wales and Owens Gap, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ourimbah has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Owens Gap (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ourimbah or Owens Gap safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ourimbah has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Owens Gap scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ourimbah scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Owens Gap scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ourimbah or Owens Gap?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ourimbah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
